title: Better Smoke
body:
![Description Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/324f60461e173c3a90b8f8dec80578e26aba3bc7_0.webp)
**Better Campfire Smoke** is a lightweight and configurable client-side mod that alters the vanilla campfire particle emitter to look more pleasant.

## Features
1. Campfires will emit smoke particles that flow in the wind, allowing for a better and more visually pleasing representation of campsites, chimneys, and factory smoke stacks.
2. The more campfires you place, the larger the smoke plume.
3. Wind is affected by in game weather.
4. Soul campfires emit a slightly darker plume of smoke that tints blue as it rises.
5. Fully configurable and completely client-side.

## Recommendations
While not required, I reccomend installing [Particle Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core) as it can make both performance and transparency stacking slightly better.

## Disclaimer
This mod could be somewhat graphically heavy on some low end hardware due to the amount of particles.
